data.name: The Masculine Urge To Blow a Femboy
data.detailed_description:
Male on Femboy, Femboy on Male

After finding a femboy online who catches your fancy, and consuming all his free content, you find yourself overcome by an unexpected urge.

Yearning for more, you decide to become a fan.

But what does it mean to be a fan?

Is it about support, attention, or time? Are you part of an emerging culture? Being a fan can mean many things—it can be a form of identity, a shared passion, or even a way to belong. But one aspect remains undeniable—unwavering loyalty. 🍆

Read through some pretty raunchy(erotic) dialogue, accompanied by spicy nude depictions.

Gameplay

  • Choose to be top or bottom

  • H-Scenes

  • ~6K words

Immerse yourself in the story by typing in your own name, then proceeding to read through a raunchy story from the first-person perspective.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz Pentium 4
  • 記憶體: 400 MB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 200 MB 可用空間
